response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive open-source contributions, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems, direct experience with vector databases/RAG architectures, or leadership in customer-facing technical discovery sessions critical for the staff-level role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
Strong full-stack skills with TypeScript, cloud (AWS CDK), and distributed systems
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers
8+ years of GenAI production experience is not clearly established or quantified
